The '''Lucaya system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] that was located within the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], on the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ession]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}}
